title: Clive Flax
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Update|[[The Last of the Jedi: Secret Weapon]], [[The Last of the Jedi: Against the Empire]]}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Clive Flax |homeworld=[[Belazura]] |birth= |death=[[12 BBY/Legends|12 BBY]]Lune Divinian, born in 27 BBY, was fifteen years old when Astri and Clive were killed by the Empire, according to ''[[Rebel Force: Trapped]]''. |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Blue |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Clever. But we're cleverer.''"
"''That's not a word.''"
"''Sure it is. Come on.|Clive Flax and Ferus Olin as they hunt down a computer saboteur on the planet [[Samaria/Legends|Samaria]]|''[[The Last of the Jedi: A Tangled Web]]''}} '''Clive Flax''' was a double agent and a friend of [[Ferus Olin]]. He would often pose as a musician in nightclubs to gather the information he needed unnoticed. ==Biography== Clive Flax was a native of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Belazura]], but he felt no attachment to his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], and wandered [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Flax met Olin shortly before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], when the former [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi]] was still operating his company [[Olin and Lands]] on [[Bellassa/Legends|Bellassa]]. After the galaxy-wide war erupted, Ferus assigned Flax to an operation on the planet [[Jabor]]. Using his skills of infiltration, Flax was able to reveal and sabotage a ring of [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Spy/Legends|spies]] that ran throughout the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. After the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Flax found it more difficult to operate and was eventually arrested and thrown into a [[Prison/Legends|prison]] on the planet [[Dontamo]]. Eventually he was reunited with Ferus after he was also sentenced to Dontamo. Flax found and rescued him from an angry fellow prisoner and together they escaped the prison. Flax traveled with Ferus and his companions to [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] where they received help from [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Rugor Nass]] and the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] people to rid Naboo of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] activity. Clive later helped Ferus find a saboteur of the computer system on the planet [[Samaria/Legends|Samaria]]. He escaped the Empire's clutches with other members of the [[Erased]], but Ferus stayed behind, challenging [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. Clive returned to Olin's secret [[Jedi asteroid|asteroid base]], upset that he had to help out with fixing the place up. Later, Clive asked [[Astri Oddo]] to help him to find out who [[Eve Yarrow|Flame]] really was. After going to [[Niro 11]], the two ended at Eve Yarrow's home on [[Revery]]. It was there they discovered that Flame was in fact [[Eve Yarrow]], and that she was in league with [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. Astri and Clive then contacted the [[Jedi asteroid|base]], warning them of this. After the base was destroyed by Vader's superweapon, himself and Astri agreed to adopt [[Trever Flume|Trever]] after he was brainwashed so that he knew nothing about Darth Vader's real identity or anything that happened in the last year. Before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Clive and Astri were [[Death/Legends|killed]] by Imperials on an Imperial garrison. ==Behind the scenes== ''Return of the Dark Side'' misspells Clive Flax as Clive Fax. ==Appearances== *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Death on Naboo]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The Last of the Jedi: A Tangled Web]]'' *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Return of the Dark Side]]'' *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Secret Weapon]]'' *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Against the Empire]]'' *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Master of Deception]]'' *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Reckoning]]'' *''[[Rebel Force: Firefight]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[Rebel Force: Trapped]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Rebel Force: Uprising]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Clive Flax }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Flax, Clive}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Information brokers]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Resistance fighters]] [[Category:Spies]]
